meaning: vt.逐出,撵出,驱逐,喷射n.推断的事物
examples: Officials used guard dogs to eject the protesters.
You can now safely eject the CD.
I said to myself, I can't eject yet.
Yet instead of hitting the eject button, the same investors poured in more capital.
Yet Canadians seem in no hurry for a new election to eject their federal minority Conservative government.
